It powers the docs for a few of my other projects."}],["$","h3",null,{"children":"What I learned"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li","0",{"children":"Most docs sites don't need a SPA — and are faster without one."}],["$","li","1",{"children":"A prebuilt search index is plenty for the sizes most docs reach."}],["$","li","2",{"children":"Conventions age better than configuration."}]]}]]}]]}]}]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"section","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"container","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"eyebrow","children":"Next"}],["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/work/orbit-analytics","className":"proj-card","style":{"marginTop":24,"gridTemplateColumns":"1fr 1fr","display":"grid","gap":32,"alignItems":"center"},"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"img-slot proj-card-img","data-label":"Orbit Analytics","style":{"aspectRatio":"16 / 9"},"aria-hidden":true}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"proj-tag","children":["Product"," · ",2025]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"proj-name","style":{"fontSize":40,"marginTop":8},"children":"Orbit Analytics"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"proj-blurb","style":{"marginTop":12},"children":"A privacy-first product analytics platform that returns funnel results in under 200ms on billions of events."}]]}]]}]]}]}]]}],null,["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","$4",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@5"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"cq9Q9J7UkxT6Kp5YPUbwV"}
